items.label: Depth Bass
items.text: bass depth max, sub-bass presence, 40Hz low-end

items.label: Punch Drums
items.text: punchy drums, tight kick, compressed snare, clear transients

items.label: Wide Stereo
items.text: wide stereo field, hard-panned guitars, immersive soundscape

items.label: Tape Warmth
items.text: analog tape warmth, subtle saturation, vinyl texture

items.label: Dynamic Range
items.text: wide dynamic range, breath between sections, pianissimo to fortissimo

items.label: Mix Clarity
items.text: clean mix, balanced EQ, no muddy mids, crystal clear high end
